{"action":"opened","issue":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/55839","repository_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia","labels_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/55839/labels{/name}","comments_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/55839/comments","events_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/55839/events","html_url":"https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/issues/55839","id":2541137056,"node_id":"I_kwDOABkWpM6Xdqyg","number":55839,"title":"unhelpful error message for @edit when JULIA_EDITOR, VISUAL, or EDITOR environment not set","user":{"login":"devel-chm","id":789881,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjc4OTg4MQ==","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/789881?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/devel-chm","html_url":"https://github.com/devel-chm","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/devel-chm/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/devel-chm/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/devel-chm/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/devel-chm/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/devel-chm/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/devel-chm/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/devel-chm/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/devel-chm/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/devel-chm/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"labels":[],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":0,"created_at":"2024-09-22T15:44:20Z","updated_at":"2024-09-22T15:44:20Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"I just tried ``@edit pwd()`` in the REPL but on a new computer where I did not have the
usual environment variables configured.  The result was this less-than-helpful error:

> julia> @edit pwd()
> ERROR: SystemError: edit: No error
> Stacktrace:
>  [1] systemerror(p::Symbol, errno::Int32; extrainfo::Nothing)
>    @ Base .\error.jl:176
>  [2] systemerror
>    @ .\error.jl:175 [inlined]
>  [3] (::InteractiveUtils.var"#18#32")(cmd::Cmd, path::String, line::Int32)
>    @ InteractiveUtils C:\Software\Julia\julia-1.10.5\share\julia\stdlib\v1.10\InteractiveUtils\src\editless.jl:185
>  [4] edit(path::String, line::Int32, column::Int64)
>    @ InteractiveUtils C:\Software\Julia\julia-1.10.5\share\julia\stdlib\v1.10\InteractiveUtils\src\editless.jl:240
>  [5] edit
>    @ C:\Software\Julia\julia-1.10.5\share\julia\stdlib\v1.10\InteractiveUtils\src\editless.jl:232 [inlined]
>  [6] edit(f::Any, t::Any)
>    @ InteractiveUtils C:\Software\Julia\julia-1.10.5\share\julia\stdlib\v1.10\InteractiveUtils\src\editless.jl:272
>  [7] top-level scope
>    @ REPL[36]:1

It would be much more useful if the error indicated that the JULIA_EDITOR/VISUAL/EDITOR
needs to be set to your editor of choice.

For reference this is julia-1.10.5 installed from the portable, 64bit, windows install:

> Julia Version 1.10.5
> Commit 6f3fdf7b36 (2024-08-27 14:19 UTC)
> Build Info:
>   Official https://julialang.org/ release
> Platform Info:
>   OS: Windows (x86_64-w64-mingw32)
>   CPU: 16 × 11th Gen Intel(R) Core(TM) i7-11700 @ 2.50GHz
>   WORD_SIZE: 64
>   LIBM: libopenlibm
>   LLVM: libLLVM-15.0.7 (ORCJIT, rocketlake)
> Threads: 4 default, 1 interactive, 2 GC (on 16 virtual cores)
